message.content:
You are reviewing the SCRN002 Snippet Manager screen implementation as a PR reviewer. This is a Raycast UI clone project.

The task was: Build Snippet Manager screen with list view of saved snippets. Each item shows: name, keyword (as tag accessory), preview of content. Actions: Insert, Edit (pushes Form), Copy, Delete. Create Snippet form accessible via ⌘N. Push via navigation from "Search Snippets" in root search. The view is self-contained (isFullView pattern like Clipboard History).

Files to review:
1. src/data/snippet_data.ts - Mock data with 14 snippet entries across categories
2. src/components/snippet_manager/snippet_manager_view.tsx - Main component with list, edit/create form, actions
3. src/components/snippet_manager/snippet_manager_view.scss - Styles  
4. src/App.tsx - Integration (wiring NavViewData, push from root search)

Review criteria:
- TypeScript correctness (no `as any`, proper types)
- React patterns (hooks usage, memoization, callback stability)
- Accessibility (ARIA patterns, keyboard navigation)
- No unused code, no dead branches
- Matches the self-contained pattern from ClipboardHistoryView (own SearchBar, ActionPanel, Alert, HUD)
- SCSS follows project conventions (BEM, tokenized values)
- No comments in code unless JSDoc
- The 'form' NavViewData type was removed from App.tsx since SnippetManagerView handles its own create/edit form internally via subView state

Be thorough. Report any issues found (bugs, missing features, type issues, accessibility gaps, unused imports/code). If everything looks good, say so explicitly.

content.text: I'll start by reading the files to review, plus the existing patterns from ClipboardHistoryView for comparison.
